introSection: Schtroumpfeur (Dutch: Smurfer) is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Plopsaland Ardennes in Stavelot, Liège, Belgium. From opening until 2005, the ride was called Roller. It was then called Coaster until the end of the 2013 season, after which it became Halvar. A new name and theme based on The Smurfs was announced for the 2022 season. It is a custom terrain coaster from Vekoma.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride uses Vekoma's Custom MK-700 track system, which is smaller than a typical roller coaster. The cars have inline seating.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and green supports. The ride opened with yellow track and blue supports.

fullText:
Schtroumpfeur (Dutch: Smurfer) is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Plopsaland Ardennes in Stavelot, Liège, Belgium. From opening until 2005, the ride was called Roller. It was then called Coaster until the end of the 2013 season, after which it became Halvar. A new name and theme based on The Smurfs was announced for the 2022 season. It is a custom terrain coaster from Vekoma.

The ride uses Vekoma's Custom MK-700 track system, which is smaller than a typical roller coaster. The cars have inline seating.

Red track and green supports. The ride opened with yellow track and blue supports.
